board.race_name: FERNESS @ SIRES ON ICE MAX 150 PTS
HOMING DOGS WITH HOME RUN HOUNDS STAKES
BOOK A WINNING DEAL FOR 15 STAKES
EIGHT TO GLORY, PRESENTED BY LENOVO
PRIX DE LA SOURCE DE BUGLOSE

R:HAP:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. BEAUTY SHOW is building toward a maiden win, leading last start and just missing by 0.5L. He's since trialled well and Purton sticks with him from his latest trial. Has the speed to roll across from out wide and can notch up his maiden victory this time around. 1. GRAND NOVA got the job done when beating Beauty Show last start when running over the top to score at this track and trip. He's trialled well coming into this and drawing away from the fence should suit him better this time. Can go back-to-back. 11. JUMBO BLESSING hasn't been far away in recent efforts, as he still aims for his maiden win, beaten 2L as the race favourite last time out. Moreira remains in the irons and a forward showing is on the cards. 8. HARMONY FIRE is ticking along nicely, missing out narrowly to Grand Nova last start. Wong's claim comes in handy and he won't be far away.

runners.name: BEAUTY SHOW
runners.comment: At the latest run set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Grand Nova with 58.5kg at $8.70. The run before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1000m, 3 len behind Tycoon Resources with 58.5kg at $5.30. Shapes as one of the key chances.

runners.name: JUMBO BLESSING
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 6th of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 2 len behind Grand Nova with 56kg at $3. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Ka Ying Lightning with 56kg at $6.80. Expected to measure up.

runners.name: GRAND NOVA
runners.comment: Most recently won by 0.5 len at this track June 10 over 1000m defeating Beauty Show carrying 59kg at $8.10. Before that 7th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 31 over 1000m, 3 len behind Ka Ying Lightning carrying 58kg at $8.90. Impressed last start and can go on with it.

runners.name: HARMONY FIRE
runners.comment: Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Grand Nova with 56kg at $11. The run before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at this track on May 20 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Tycoon Resources with 57.5kg at $29. Among the leading chances.

runners.name: ZOUPER FELLOW
runners.comment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. Most recently sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Sha Tin on June 7 over 1200m, 13 len behind Master Payment with 54.5kg at $12. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 14 at Sha Tin on May 17 over 1000m, 7 len behind Lahore carrying 56.5kg at $11. Expect he will make amends.

runners.name: LUCKY TWENTY
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 14 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1200m, 5 len behind Packing Glory carrying 58kg at $97. Before that raced on the pace before fading 11th of 14 at Sha Tin on April 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Packing King with 58.5kg at $75. Prefer in something easier.

runners.comment: Most recently ran second last of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 5 len behind Grand Nova carrying 56kg at $5.40. runners.name: GIANT SPIRIT

runners.comment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation ran second last of 14 at Sha Tin on April 26 over 1200m, 16 len behind Mr Incredible with 56.5kg at $153. runners.comment: Was at long odds at debut, ran last of 14 at Sha Tin on June 21 over 1000m, 31 len behind Rapid Phantom carrying 58kg at $44. Others rate better.

runners.name: BOLTZ
runners.comment: At debut, ran last of 12 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 14 len behind Grand Nova carrying 58.5kg at $22. Doubt he will trouble these.

R:SCV:4:2026-07-08.comment: 1. DEONARIE is a two-start maiden who looks close to a win after placing at both runs, the latest when second over 1200m at Greyville. Going well and should go close again. 5. REDOUBT EXPRESS ran well on debut last start to finish third over 1400m at Greyville in a tougher race. Promising type with improvement to come so he should be in the finish again. 10. CHARLIE BUCKET is racing well and has registered four minor placings in a row, last time out finishing third over 1600m at Kenilworth. Generally takes a sit but the draw makes it tricky. Taking on a better line-up this time but he deserves plenty of thought. 11. IMPERIAL VALOR finished second last time over 1400m at this track, beaten a neck. In the right race and is a key runner.

runners.name: DEONARIE
runners.comment: Third race start today. At very long odds at debut, 3rd of 16 at this track on May 23 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Tudor Rose carrying 60kg at $101. Second-up 2nd of 9 at Greyville on June 13 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Kid From The South with 60kg at $7. Nearing a win. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: CHARLIE BUCKET
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 45-day let-up. At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Kenilworth on May 24 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Mutiny In Heaven with 60.5kg at $3.30. Before that 2nd of 11 at Kenilworth on April 18 over 1400m, 1.3 len behind Ferryman carrying 59.5kg at $2.70. This is well within his grasp.

runners.name: REDOUBT EXPRESS
runners.comment: At debut, 3rd of 10 at Greyville on June 6 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Pressure Point with 56kg at $7. Encouraging signs on debut and another big run is likely.

runners.name: IMPERIAL VALOR

The run before that ran second last in a small field at Greyville All Weather on April 17 over 1200m, 8 len behind William Of Orange with 56.5kg at $11. Made headway last time. Top chance.

runners.name: SIMONIS
runners.comment: Having third race start. At debut, ran second last of 7 at this track on April 29 over 1200m, 8 len behind Roskilde carrying 54.7kg at $21. Last start 7th of 16 at this track on May 23 over 1200m, 5 len behind Tudor Rose with 60kg at $51. Has the ability to be in the finish.

runners.name: ROYAL SCEPTRE
runners.comment: Comes off a 39 day let-up. Last start 7th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Quandura carrying 57kg at $13.50. The start before that 5th of 11 at this track on April 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Vibe Check with 60kg at $41. Drawn well and is among the chances.

runners.name: CHOCTAW RIDGE
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 12 at Greyville on June 20 over 1600m, 5 len behind Queen Of The Air carrying kg at $13.50. Before that 6th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on June 17 over 1400m, 3 len behind Amphitrite with kg at $41. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: CAPTAIN JOSH
runners.comment: Third-up today. Freshened for 39 days. Resuming ran last of 10 at this track on May 17 over 1200m, 15 len behind Pritti United carrying 57kg at $21. Second-up 7th of 12 at Greyville on May 30 over 1400m, 6 len behind Coast Of The Sun with 60kg at $101. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

runners.name: HAND OF GOD
runners.comment: First-starter by Act Of War out of Bold Wonder. Betting the best guide.

runners.name: TICKEY BOX
runners.comment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation ran second last of 8 at this track on February 15 over 1200m, 18 len behind Best Of All with 57.5kg at $34. First up last campaign 9th of 12 at Greyville All Weather on November 12 over 1200m, 9 len behind Time In Paris with 59kg at $67. Cannot make a strong case.

R:IBL:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. BOLD LION secured a fourth win from his last six starts when taking advantage of a drop to this grade in latest scoring by 5L. Obvious chance among this company. 2. PRINCE OF DARKNESS enjoys the venue. Beaten 1.5L third in a conditions event (1400m) latest and this is certainly easier. 3. YARGIC turned things around last time landing a course and distance handicap by 0.5L a month ago. Might have a bit to find on ratings however is considered on the back of that success. 8. VICTORY MATRA delivered her best performance of the campaign when second to the main selection last time. Cannot be overlooked.

runners.name: BOLD LION
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Most recently favourite; scored a big 5 len win at this track June 17 over 1200m defeating Victory Matra with 60kg at $1.75. The race before that favourite; won by a long-neck at this track June 3 over 1100m defeating Turkish Punch carrying 58kg at $1.70. Sure to be right there at the business end.

runners.name: VICTORY MATRA
runners.comment: At the latest run 2nd of 10 at this track on June 17 over 1200m, 5 len behind Bold Lion with 56kg at $7.20. Before that ran last of 18 at Sanliurfa on April 27 over 1200m, 63 len behind Simendifer carrying 54kg at $1.70. Worth following up.

runners.name: ISEN BUGA
runners.comment: Last start 6th of 10 at Veliefendi All Weather on June 24 over 1500m, 6 len behind Black Pablo with 59.5kg at $12.90. The race before that won by 1.4 len at Yil June 13 over 1400m in soft going defeating Ispanoz carrying 60.5kg at $9.40. Recent form suggests this might be a bit too tough.

runners.name: PRINCE OF DARKNESS

Second run from a spell 3rd of 9 at this track on June 21 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Bello Boy with 58kg at $22. The inside gate brings him right into contention.

runners.name: YARGIC
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a 0.5 len at this track June 10 over 1400m defeating Touch The Cloud with 56.5kg at $3.90. The start before that 5th of 22 at this track on May 24 over 1600m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Sirius Vega carrying 56kg at $4.15. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: HARDOLD
runners.comment: At the latest run 7th of 9 at Kartepe on June 30 over 1800m, 7 len behind Osullivan carrying 57kg at $7.80. Before that 4th in a small field at Kartepe on June 23 over 1400m, 4 len behind Lovibond carrying 53kg at $14.65. This looks too tough.

runners.name: JESKO
runners.comment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 8th of 11 at this track on April 29 over 1300m, 9 len behind Bold Lion carrying 58kg at $26.30. When resuming last campaign ran second last of 9 at Veliefendi All Weather on December 27 over 1300m, 20 len behind Super Chiron with 56kg at $13.95. Others are preferred.

runners.name: MAMBA FOREVER
runners.comment: At the latest run ran last of 10 at Veliefendi All Weather on June 24 over 1500m, 34 len behind Black Pablo carrying 58.5kg at $33.20. Before that ran second last of 8 at this track on May 31 over 1600m, 11 len behind Tay Fark with 57kg at $26.50. Not on recent form.

runners.name: WINNER GETS IT ALL
runners.comment: Most recently 8th of 10 at Veliefendi All Weather on June 24 over 1500m, 13 len behind Black Pablo carrying 57.5kg at $18.15. The race before that 6th of 8 at Kartepe on June 2 over 1500m, 16 len behind Lovibond with 57kg at $5.90. Doesn't pose too much of a threat.

G:NAM:5:2026-07-08.comment: 1. NO LUCK improved last time out when when starting 12m from scratch in a handicap, finishing second and beaten one length at this track over 500m (31.39). Will enjoy the 19m start. Can continue the upward trend. 6. PLATINUM LARK hit the ground running with a scorching early sectional but had to settle for a minor placing when a neck second over 500m at this track, clocking 30.39. Bold showing expected. 3. BABY BONO jumped well and was in the mix early before fading out of it late when 6th over 500m at this track in HCP company. Solid record here at the distance winning 15 races. One of the main contenders. 2. HONOUR JANICE is mixing her form recently. Nice effort to finish second two runs back at this track then switched to the handicaps with a 15m advantage and finished fifth, beaten 9 lengths, at this track over 500m (31.95). Tackles another handicap here and will break 19m from scratch. This looks a suitable assignment.

runners.name: NO LUCK
runners.comment: Has raced five times and is overdue for a win, the latest offering a second (31.39) over 500m at this track. Great chance to break through.

runners.name: NIDDERDALE KILN
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 500m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

runners.name: PLATINUM LARK
runners.comment: Hit the ground running with a scorching early sectional but found one better when runner up over 500m at this track clocking 30.39. Capable of a strong show.

runners.name: YOGUARTPOTJOHN
runners.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 9 length sixth (30.55) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Has ability but will need everything to go right.

runners.name: HONOUR JANICE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (31.78) over 500m at this track. Capable of a better result.

runners.name: BABY BONO
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on July 3 over 500m at this track behind Cruiser Finn, beaten 6 lengths (30.87) in a HCP. Didn't show up last start but give her another chance.

R:MBS:12:2026-07-08.comment: 8. ROARING FLAME showed good early speed and led throughout to score by half a length last start over 1000m at this track. Will prove very tough to beat. 3. REPRESENT turned in a nice effort last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished just 1.5 lengths from the winner in second over 1200m at this track. Meeting a deeper field this time but he cannot be overlooked. 9. WIN STRATEGY continues to race well with a win two back at this track before finishing 1.5 lengths away in second last time over 1200m at this track. Should be thereabouts again. 1. GRASS TOP ROAD ran a bold race over this journey last start, racing on the pace and sticking on strongly to finish 3 lengths away in third at this track. Steps up a level but he is good enough to take this out.

runners.name: WIN STRATEGY
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 11 at this track on June 25 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Lady Pyro with 57kg at $3.60. The start before that won by 0.8 len at this track May 27 over 1200m defeating Honeyberry carrying 57kg at $4.40. Genuine contender.

runners.name: ROARING FLAME
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start favourite; won by 0.5 len at this track June 23 over 1000m defeating Earth Calling carrying 55kg at $2.10. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Nishiken Cabal with 55kg at $2.90. No reason she cannot salute again.

runners.name: QUEEN'S ARTEMIS
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after a year made ground from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track on June 24 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Midnight Gale with 53kg at $6.30. Previously second-up 3rd of 14 at this track on May 15 2025 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Pierre Oregon carrying 55kg at $5.20. Don't underestimate.

runners.name: DUAL CAREER

runners.name: GRASS TOP ROAD

The race before that won by 0.5 len at this track June 9 over 1000m defeating Kia Kia carrying 57kg at $5.90. Worth thought from inside alley.

runners.name: REPRESENT
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 11th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 2 over 1400m, 11 len behind Kyoei Se Leve carrying 58.0kg at $13.40. runners.name: DSUNGARIPTERUS
runners.comment: At the latest run 4th of 11 at this track on June 25 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Lady Pyro carrying 57kg at $18.80. Before that 5th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 7 len behind Kamiwa Matteiru with 57kg at $95.60. Racing okay but look elsewhere.

runners.name: MANO LEA
runners.comment: At the latest run got back early 8th of 11 at this track on June 25 over 1200m, 9 len behind Lady Pyro with 55kg at $37.80. The run before that got back early 7th of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 8 len behind Kamiwa Matteiru carrying 55kg at $152.30. Tricky assignment.

runners.name: KURIIRO

runners.name: JASPER SHINE
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 12 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 14 len behind Kamiwa Matteiru with 57kg at $61.30. Before that eased back early on 10th of 14 at this track on April 30 over 1200m, 8 len behind Dual Career carrying 57kg at $63.50. Nice draw but others preferred.

runners.name: COMBAT ANGE
runners.comment: Most recently ran second last of 11 at this track on June 25 over 1200m, 16 len behind Lady Pyro carrying 55kg at $279.60. The start before that ran last of 8 at this track on June 10 over 1000m, 15 len behind Sayuribana carrying 55kg at $267.20. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

G:MEA:9:2026-07-08.comment: 1. JETTY JUMPER missed the frame and safely held latest finishing 6th at this track following on from a win (30.12) there the start prior. Looks the one to beat on his best form. 3. YALE DEAN turned in a solid run last start over 525m at this track finishing 4th and beaten only 3.5 lengths (30.63). Comes through a solid form race last start. Should be about the mark. 7. PAW NILBERT ran below best last time finishing fourth (25.85) over 450m at Ballarat in a Mix 6/7 FIN. Has the ability to give this a shake.

runners.name: PAW QUESTON
runners.comment: Finished third last start (26.35) at big odds over 460m at Geelong. Has a low draw. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: PAW NILBERT
runners.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fourth (25.85) at Ballarat. Previous form sound including a win three back at Geelong. Rates strongly and can return to winning form.

runners.name: YALE DEAN
runners.comment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fourth at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: JETTY JUMPER
runners.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th over 525m at this track beaten 15 lengths (30.95) behind Azzurro in a Maiden FIN on July 4. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

runners.name: COIN FLIP
runners.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 460m in 26.18. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at this track at Restricted WIN a week ago. Fair run last start but needs to improve further.

runners.name: MANILA PLUTO
runners.comment: Finished second last start (24.69) over 435m at Sale. Drawn awkwardly. One of the better hopes.

runners.name: JILLIBY PIXIE
runners.comment: Finished third last start (30.58) at big odds over 525m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

runners.name: SO SAY ME
runners.comment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by a neck at this track over 525m (30.72) beating Coin Flip in Restricted WIN on July 1. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

G:CNP:4:2026-07-08.comment: 7. BOOM PANTHER was strongly fancied last time but finished second (30.39), beaten one length. Yet to score from this box but has never missed the frame in two starts. Makes plenty of appeal. 1. LIQUID DESIRE average so far in two runs, the latest finishing out the back. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 8. GO GETTEM DIMPLE was out of the money here last time out but can bounce back.

runners.name: JUKEBOX BETTY
runners.comment: Debutant by Orson Allen from Akachi. From the Enzo Crudeli kennel. Might pay to watch for a market push.

runners.name: SUPER PIT
runners.comment: Last time out finished 4th on July 1 over 520m at this track behind Lucy's Dream beaten 10 lengths (31.06) in a Maiden. Hard to have this time.

runners.name: BOOM PANTHER
runners.comment: Is a 10 start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when second (30.39) over 520m at this track. Has performed consistently off this draw. Expected to prove tough to beat.

runners.name: KNIGHT FRIGHT
runners.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 10 length fifth over 488m at Mandurah. Hard to recommend this time.

runners.name: GO GETTEM DIMPLE
runners.comment: At the last start finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (30.80) behind Dipper Monelli in a Maiden on June 10. Major threat on best form.

runners.name: LIQUID DESIRE
runners.comment: Last start finished 7th in a Maiden on June 9 over 400m at Mandurah behind Athenian Blade beaten 8 lengths (23.60). Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

runners.name: EXILE BULLET
runners.comment: First starter by Feral Franky from Exile Dreamer. Trained by Christine Robartson. The market will give the best guide to his chances.

G:KIK:10:2026-07-08.comment: 4. CASHEL AMY jumped from this trap and went down narrowly when a half a length second (30.23) in an A7 at this track over 480m latest. Makes plenty of appeal if runs up to latest. 3. FEED ME PICKLES was strongly supported last start but missed the frame when fourth (30.48), beaten 4 lengths.

runners.name: RATCHIES GAMBLE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Ballinure Paddy beaten 2.75 lengths (30.52) in an A6. Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: CASHEL AMY
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Home Cedrie at this track last start over 480m (30.23). Right in the mix.

runners.name: RATHDUFF DANCER
runners.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by one length at this track (29.95) beating Chiltern Emmie in an A7 on June 17. Others better.

runners.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by half a length over 480m at this track in a handy 30.23, beating Brandons Boy. Well suited by the draw. Winner last time and looks well placed again. Worth following up.

runners.name: AIMINY JACK
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 480m at this track. Others preferred.

G:ROC:9:2026-07-08.comment: 8. FARMOR AGAIN boasts strong form at this course and distance having won two times from three starts. Comes off a (21.76) win last time, scoring by a nose in a Grade 5 over 380m at Townsville. Looks well placed and should feature. 2. SHE'S NO LADY comes off an average performance last start when sixth at Townsville over 498m behind Located (29.85) in a Grade 5. Comes out of a solid form race last start. Should be in this for a long way. 1. MR. WILLIAMS put in a much better performance last start when in the placings at this track behind Weaving (24.15) in a Grade 4. Has the pace to be prominent. Expected to feature. 5. TUSKEN TIGER must be included on latest effort.

runners.name: CALAMITY CORNER
runners.comment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 407m at this track. That followed a win two back in 23.90 beating Go Go Cambla over 407m at this track. Not among the main chances this time.

runners.name: SHE'S NO LADY
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on June 16 over 498m at Townsville behind Located beaten 11 lengths (29.85) in a Grade 5. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

runners.name: MR. WILLIAMS
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5 length second (24.15) over 407m at this track. Has ability and among the chances.

runners.name: JESTER BEACH
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh over 407m at this track, beaten 11 lengths (24.29) behind Carol Rain in a Grade 3/4 on July 1. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: TUSKEN TIGER
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when third behind Calamity Corner at this track last start over 407m (24.00). Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: FARMOR AGAIN
runners.comment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Townsville over 380m (21.76) beating Shian Mikey in Grade 5 on June 19. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

R:DAX:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZELICA recorded a good effort placing 5L second over 2400m at Bordeaux. Selected to record a victory dropping in distance. 6. MOREA followed up a close second at Toulouse with a 5.75L fourth in the previously mentioned Bordeaux event. Expected to be playing a role in the finish. 2. NIKITA DU MAZET faded late running 6.75L fifth tackling 1800m in a claiming handicap at Langon-Libourne. One to note with a tongue tie applied for the first time. Successful twice last year 1. R:HAP:3:2026-07-08.comment: 4. BEAUTY SHOW is building toward a maiden win, leading last start and just missing by 0.5L. He's since trialled well and Purton sticks with him from his latest trial. runners.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on June 16 over 498m at Townsville behind Located beaten 11 lengths (29.85) in a Grade 5. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

runners.name: TUSKEN TIGER
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when third behind Calamity Corner at this track last start over 407m (24.00). Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: MR. WILLIAMS
runners.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5 length second (24.15) over 407m at this track. Has ability and among the chances.

runners.name: JESTER BEACH
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh over 407m at this track, beaten 11 lengths (24.29) behind Carol Rain in a Grade 3/4 on July 1. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: FARMOR AGAIN
runners.comment: Solid performance to win by a nose at Townsville over 380m (21.76) beating Shian Mikey in Grade 5 on June 19. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

R:DAX:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. ZELICA recorded a good effort placing 5L second over 2400m at Bordeaux. Selected to record a victory dropping in distance. 6. MOREA followed up a close second at Toulouse with a 5.75L fourth in the previously mentioned Bordeaux event. Expected to be playing a role in the finish. 2. NIKITA DU MAZET faded late running 6.75L fifth tackling 1800m in a claiming handicap at Langon-Libourne. One to note with a tongue tie applied for the first time. Successful twice last year 1. ASSIER is another with claims after managing a 9.75L seventh contesting the previously mentioned Langon-Libourne event.

runners.name: MOREA
runners.comment: Recent form sound. Most recently made ground from midfield; 4th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 52.5kg at $8.70. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, head behind Starecto with 52.5kg at $11. Finds a suitable race and looks one of the key runners.

runners.name: ULTRASOUND
runners.comment: At the latest run 6th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 6 len behind Nekoleto carrying 54kg at $5.80. The race before that 3rd of 11 at Toulouse on May 27 over 2400m, 0.5 len behind Starecto with 54kg at $4.70. Better placed and expected to be in the finish.

runners.name: ZELICA
runners.comment: At the latest run 2nd of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 5 len behind Nekoleto with 52.5kg at $12. The race before that 6th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 3.5 len behind Pop Life with 52.5kg at $32. Worth following.

runners.name: PRAY FOR HOPE
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 12 at Longchamp on June 11 over 2400m, 2.5 len behind Brivido Moon with 53.5kg at $4.50. The run before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 8 at Salon-de-Provence on May 25 over 2400m, 3 len behind Hashtag Joa carrying 54kg at $6.90. Among the top chances.

runners.name: MOON OF THE NIGHT
runners.comment: Most recently 7th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 8 len behind Nekoleto with 54.5kg at $19. The race before that 6th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 3 len behind Sedition with 55kg at $16. Hard to beat on her best form.

runners.name: ASSIER
runners.comment: Last start 7th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 9 len behind Wathab carrying 66kg. The race before that 4th in a small field at Limoges on May 17 over 2400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Agelka with 66kg. Better than the last run suggests and can make amends.

runners.name: NIKITA DU MAZET
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at Langon-Libourne on June 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Wathab with 64.5kg. The run before that faded in the straight 9th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 12 len behind Pop Life carrying 53kg at $18. Can do a lot better than that last run.

runners.name: AMORETTI
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 14th of 16 at La Teste De Buch on June 3 over 1900m, 12 len behind Lady Darka carrying 51.5kg at $23. Previously second-up ran last of 12 at this track on May 1 2025 over 2300m, 7 len behind Peyrassol carrying 58.5kg at $63. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

runners.name: MA CHERIE AMOUR
runners.comment: Returns from a 30-day let-up. Most recently 13th of 15 at Toulouse on June 8 over 2200m, 17 len behind Pop Life carrying 52.5kg at $47. Before that 10th of 13 at Tarbes on May 11 over 2100m, slow going 6 len behind Sedition with 54.5kg at $19. Must improve sharply.

runners.name: PINTXOPOTE
runners.comment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 61 days. Resuming ran last in a small field at Agen on April 26 over 3200m, slow going 46 len behind Wukolina carrying 66kg. Second run from a spell 6th of 8 at Gabarret on May 8 over 2550m, 26 len behind Atlantigo carrying 54.5kg. Prepared to risk.

runners.name: ASHUTOR
runners.comment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 13th of 15 at Bordeaux on June 15 over 2400m, 21 len behind Nekoleto carrying 51.5kg at $74. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Cazaubon Barbotan Therme on September 1 over 3600m, on a slow track; 28 len behind Olkar carrying 64kg. Best form is over the jumps and looks safely held.

G:MNM:7:2026-07-08.comment: 1. TOMMYS LUNA was game in defeat off the inside draw last start, finishing third and beaten 2 lengths (16.20) behind Elderberry Luna at this track. The form from her last run stacks up well. Capable of going well again. 3. WINTERFIELD BABY had been racing in honest fashion recording two placings in a row before finishing fifth (16.88) at this track latest. Has a good record at this journey. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Cannot be underestimated. 6. KILLIMOR CANYA is overdue for a maiden success having placed at eight of 23 starts and finishing in the money again at this track. Has finished in the money the last two starts. Form from her last run is proving to be solid. Leading chance. 2. AERO BAMBOO has ability and can feature with the right run after missing a cheque here most recently.

runners.name: MAGICAL BE HAPPY
runners.comment: Last start finished fifth on June 30 over 264m at this track behind Good Luna, beaten 4 lengths (16.13) in a D4. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.name: TOMMYS LUNA
runners.comment: Won two starts back over 480m at this track. Last start she finished 3rd in a D4 on June 29 over 264m at this track behind Elderberry Luna beaten 2 lengths (16.20). In form and can return to the winners' list.

runners.name: AERO BAMBOO
runners.comment: Last start finished last on July 1 over 264m at this track behind Derrymoyle Blue beaten 8 lengths (16.60) in a D4. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BABY
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th on June 17 over 264m at this track behind Richies Rocket beaten 10 lengths (16.88) in a D4. Comes through a good form race. Looks a top chance.

runners.name: THIRTY SECONDS
runners.comment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (16.35) over 264m at this track. Boxed awkwardly and will need to find best.

runners.name: KILLIMOR CANYA
runners.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (16.12) at this track, making it two placings on end. Deserves respect.

G:BAL:9:2026-07-08.comment: 2. ZIPPING ARVADA crossed over from out wide last start before finishing third (22.32) at this track in a Grade 4/5 over 390m. Got the money at her only try from this box. Rates highly and will give a great sight. 4. QUEST FOR STYLE was the fastest winner on the program last time out, running away to score by 1.75 lengths (22.10) at this track. Harder here but expected to feature again. 6. SLICK TOMMY is a talented type who notched his 14th career success when too good (22.16) at this track last time. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card in scoring last start. Can make it back-to-back wins. 1. SKETCHY DEMOS was below best last time at Warrnambool (26.24) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 10 length eighth. Has seven wins already from this draw.

runners.name: QUEST FOR STYLE
runners.comment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 22.10 over the 390m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

runners.name: SLICK TOMMY
runners.comment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 390m (22.16) beating Wyong Dallas in Grade 4/5 on July 1. Can go well again with the right run.

runners.name: SKETCHY DEMOS
runners.comment: Last start finished eighth over 450m at Warrnambool, beaten 10 lengths (26.24) behind Nova Owen in a Grade 4/5 on June 4. Well placed and among the chances here.

runners.name: BUSH MAYHEM
runners.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warrnambool over 390m in 22.30. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 400m at Geelong at Mix 3/4 level. Happy to risk this time.

runners.name: ZIPPING ARVADA
runners.comment: Jumped well at Traralgon two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at this track last start over 390m. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: PAW XANTHIE
runners.comment: Finished fifth (21.01) last start at Traralgon. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Boxed out wide and appears tested on latest effort.

runners.name: MAN OF COURAGE
runners.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 390m at this track. That followed a win two back in 20.05 beating Zipping Nuttall over 350m at Traralgon. Prepared to just watch this time.

ref.race_name: FERNESS @ SIRES ON ICE MAX 150 PTS

G:RIC:9:2026-07-08.comment: 3. SPRING ROTA jumps from box 3 again after placing (22.84) last time at this track over 401m. Deserves another chance. 1. MIDNIGHT ARROW has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (23.50) in a Grade 5 at this track. Solid record at the distance winning three races. Should be thereabouts. 7. RIVERBANK MISS put in a much better performance last start when in the placings at this track behind Wicked Raven (18.57) in a Grade 5. Turned chasing the leaders but kept coming. Must be included in calculations. 2. GULL WING is one of the chances after a minor prize in quick time last start.

runners.name: SPRING ROTA
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Shaq Keeping at this track last start over 401m (22.84). Has good early speed and will stick on.

runners.name: RIVERBANK MISS
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on July 1 over 320m at this track behind Wicked Raven beaten 2.5 lengths (18.57). Has the ability to take this out.

runners.name: MIDNIGHT ARROW
runners.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on July 3 over 401m at this track behind Noir beaten 10 lengths (23.50). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

runners.name: MISSILE BOY
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 401m at this track. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

runners.name: GULL WING
runners.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (23.01) at this track over 401m. Close to the speed and boxed on well at her latest run. In the mix again.

runners.name: STAR PEDRO
runners.comment: Lines up from box 5 for the first time after finishing a 9 length seventh at Maitland (26.03) in a Grade 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

runners.name: CLASSIC TEARS
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on July 5 over 401m at this track in a Grade 5. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

runners.name: BLURRY
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 340m at Bulli behind Scott Elysian, beaten 8 lengths (19.96) in a Grade 5. Hard to envisage a win.

runners.name: ZIPPING SCHULTZ
runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th on July 3 over 401m at this track behind Mr. Snow beaten 9 lengths (23.92) in a Grade 5. Must be included.

runners.name: FRONT END LOADER
runners.comment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on July 3 over 401m at this track behind Mr. Snow beaten 10 lengths (23.95). Capable of taking this out.
